key_items: Coinbase reports massive institutions buying Bitcoin crash despite 50% decline from ATH
Over 200 crypto firms push Senate to pass CLARITY Act with White House talks Wednesday
Strategic Bitcoin Reserve Bill published with 20-year lock-up, institutional buyers like Strive accumulating at $63,900
reasoning: Strong institutional accumulation during weakness combined with positive regulatory momentum (CLARITY Act, Strategic Reserve Bill) signals conviction buying by smart money, outweighing temporary macro headwinds and AI rotation concerns. Weak futures liquidity suggesting downside risk is offset by evidence of substantial institutional demand at current price levels near $60-63K.
risks: AI capital rotation away from crypto and weak futures market liquidity could trigger a sharp retest of $60K support if institutional buying momentum stalls.
